title: String comparison bug
symptom: Expected true for new String("ADMIN"), got false.
explanation: Uses == which compares references instead of content. Strings should be compared with .equals().

title: Trim ignored
explanation: Strings are immutable. trim() returns a new string but result is not assigned.

title: Off-by-one loop error
code: for (int i = 0; i < nums.length - 1; i++) { total += nums[i]; }
explanation: Loop stops early. Should iterate to nums.length.

title: Infinite loop
explanation: count never changes so condition is always true.

title: Concurrent modification
explanation: Cannot modify list during enhanced for loop. Use iterator.

title: Map overwrite bug
explanation: Value resets each time instead of incrementing.

title: Missing null check
explanation: Calling method on null causes crash.

title: Auto-unboxing null
code: Integer x = null; int y = x;
explanation: Auto-unboxing null throws NullPointerException.

title: Lazy stream
explanation: No terminal operation so stream never executes.

title: Stream result ignored
explanation: Stream result discarded. Must collect.

title: Race condition
explanation: Increment not atomic across threads.

title: Finally overrides return
code: try { return true; } finally { return false; }
explanation: Finally block overrides return value.

title: Optional misuse
explanation: Calling get() without check is unsafe.

title: Array out of bounds
explanation: <= goes out of bounds.

title: Wrong map value
explanation: Stores wrong value, should store index.

title: Mid overflow
explanation: Can overflow, use safer formula.

title: Infinite binary search
explanation: Boundaries never move past mid.

title: Wrong pointer movement
explanation: Pointers move in wrong direction.

title: Window never shrinks
explanation: Removes wrong element, doesn't move left pointer.

title: Wrong dp return
explanation: Should return dp[n].

title: Bad base case
explanation: Base case incorrect, should return 1.

title: equals without hashCode
explanation: Must override hashCode with equals.

title: ResultSet misuse
explanation: Must call rs.next() first.

title: Autowired not working
explanation: Spring beans must be injected, not manually instantiated.

title: Missing annotation
explanation: Missing @RestController or @GetMapping annotation.

title: SQL injection risk
code: String q = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '" + name + "'";
explanation: Concatenating input into SQL leads to injection.

title: Sleep misuse
explanation: Sleep is in milliseconds, not seconds.

title: Index misuse
explanation: Last index is size() - 1.

title: Floating point comparison
explanation: Floating point precision makes == unreliable.

title: Missing recursive progress
explanation: Recursive call never changes input.

title: Null stream source
explanation: list may be null before streaming.

title: Mutable key in map
explanation: Changing key after insertion breaks hashing.

title: No timeout set
explanation: Timeouts must be configured to avoid hanging.
